title: CRITIQUE output — verdict + blocking issues on build artifacts (04-build phase)

verification_ref.description: Path to verification.json or verify-output.json (must be verdict:verified)

locks_verified.description: All locks confirmed frozen before critique

slice.description: Skeleton id or slice id reviewed

components_reviewed.description: Component ids in scope (= build_set; prior-built not re-attacked in slice mode)

files_reviewed.description: Every source file actually read during critique (build_units[].files ∪ composition.files)

verdict.description: Critique outcome: clean (no issues) | blocked (issues found); deterministic from issues array

issues.description: Blocking-grade anti-cheat issues only; [] on an honest diff

target_component.description: Component id the issue is found in

target_file.description: Concrete file:symbol where the cheat lives

finding.description: The cheat + which frozen test/contract it defrauds + why a hostile reviewer blocks the demo. Cites concrete file:symbol + CT*/AC*/R* defrauded

fix_hint.description: Concrete actionable change the routed stage should make to clear the cheat

critique_counts.description: Tallies of components reviewed, files reviewed, and issues by category

files_reviewed.description: Count of source files actually read

by_category.description: Per-category issue tallies; sums to issue_count

skeleton_fidelity.description: Slice-build only: confirms slice diff is additive and no frozen skeleton artifact was reshaped (H14/B8)

breached.description: True = slice edited a frozen skeleton artifact → blocking issue routed Phase 2/INTEGRATE

skeleton_artifacts_checked.description: Frozen skeleton artifacts inspected during fidelity check
